title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0345
summary: 1 We are called upon in this case to determine whether Regulation 3450 of the Veterans' Administration1 is in accord with a proper construction of § 602(h)(2) of the National Service Life Insurance Act of 1940.2 2 Respondent, Tillie Zazove, was designated beneficiary in a $5,000 contract of Natio...
